raw_excerpt: Earlier this year, the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) issued an Advance Notice of Proposed Rulemaking (ANPRM) on prediction markets as part of Chairman Selig’s aim of promoting responsible innovation in derivatives markets. The CFTC has overseen these markets for more than two decades, but this ANPRM signals a reinvigorated commitment to getting the regulatory framework...
title: Getting prediction market regulation right
